author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Added data_ref() zero-copy CPU alias to Tensor<T>. Fixed unary_map to use borrowed data() on CPU path instead of data_vec(). Fixed 3 data_vec() calls in linalg.rs grad_fns (batch_transpose, swap_last_two, reduce_to_shape) to use the cpu-then-borrow pattern — avoids the redundant .to_vec() copy on CPU tensors. All 603 tests pass.
